__meta__.description: Latest measured backtest metrics and minimum acceptable thresholds. Update after each retrain. Thresholds enforce quality floors — tighten as model improves.
__meta__.note: Tier 3 retrain: PreseasonProjector + tighter recency weighting (halflife 1.5). Weekly walk-forward metrics below. Season-total model (preseason_projector.json) achieves RB=0.604, WR=0.496, TE=0.460 R² on 2025 OOS holdout.
